title: Draft Version 23: Swap CETA and HOPE logos in navbar, hero, and footer

requirements.text: Replace the existing CETA logo image with the newly uploaded CETA-3.png (CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust circular seal in dark red) in the navbar (Navigation.tsx), hero section (HeroSection.tsx), and footer (Footer.tsx), preserving the same size, position, and alt text as the previous logo in each location.

quotes: Simply replace the existing ones in the same spots
Draft Version 23 with exact CETA & HOPE new logos swapped into their original positions (navbar, hero, footer) while keeping everything else from Version 5 intact.

acceptanceCriteria: The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the navbar where the old CETA logo was displayed
The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the hero section where the old CETA logo was displayed
The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the footer where the old CETA logo was displayed
No other visual or functional changes are made relative to Version 5

requirements.text: Replace the existing HOPE logo image with the newly uploaded HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png (HOPE – Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education circular logo with cupped hands) in the navbar (Navigation.tsx), hero section (HeroSection.tsx), and footer (Footer.tsx), preserving the same size, position, and alt text as the previous logo in each location.

quotes: Simply replace the existing ones in the same spots
Draft Version 23 with exact CETA & HOPE new logos swapped into their original positions (navbar, hero, footer) while keeping everything else from Version 5 intact.

acceptanceCriteria: The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the navbar where the old HOPE logo was displayed
The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the hero section where the old HOPE logo was displayed
The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the footer where the old HOPE logo was displayed
No other visual or functional changes are made relative to Version 5

requirements.text: Save CETA-3.png and HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them from Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx using their respective static asset paths.
acceptanceCriteria: HOPE logo is accessible at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with a clean filename
All three components reference these static paths correctly and images load without errors

constraints: All other content, layout, styles, and functionality must remain identical to Version 5 — only the logo image sources are changed.
Do not modify any backend files.
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Resizing or repositioning logos beyond matching the existing dimensions of Version 5
Any content, copy, color, or layout changes beyond logo replacement
Adding new sections or modifying existing sections other than swapping logo src attributes
